title: Admin reconnect leaves existing members with broken MLS state
description: Trigger: Admin disconnects (network drop, Ctrl-C, relay restart) while B and C are connected and in the MLS group. Admin reconnects. Bad behavior: On Reconnecting, mls_active=false but mls.group is not cleared (commands.rs:121-126). On DirectoryList after reconnect, if i_am_admin && !mls_active, create_group() is called (line 176-184), creating a fresh group with just the admin at epoch 0. But the relay does NOT replay UserJoined events for B and C who are already connected -- they're in the DirectoryList but no UserJoined fires for them. Admin only calls GetKeyPackage in response to UserJoined (lines 201-208). B and C are never re-added to the new group. Admin encrypts messages with the new group keys (epoch 1+). B and C still have their old group keys from before the admin's reconnect. Every message from admin is undecryptable by B and C. The MLS session is permanently broken for all existing members until they individually disconnect and reconnect.
